title: selaginella denticulata
intro: Selaginella denticulata, also known as the toothed spikemoss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling, fever, and infections. The health benefits of Selaginella denticulata include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Selaginella denticulata can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
